title: Hello World
content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
Quick StartCreate a new post          BASH 共 1 行                      展开    $ hexo new "My New Post"
More info: Writing
Run server          BASH 共 1 行                      展开    $ hexo server
More info: Server
Generate static files          BASH 共 1 行                      展开    $ hexo generate
More info: Generating
Deploy to remote sites          BASH 共 1 行                      展开    $ hexo deploy
More info: Deployment

title: test
content: 博客这样算是成功建起来了，目前还没能够学会如何自定义博客排版，hexo 以及 markdown 都属于完全不会只会照搬的系列，github 指令不是很熟更新会比较慢，欢迎交流。也欢迎来找我摆烂摸鱼 (BUSHI)。这里尝试上传张艾莉妮的图片：
